case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. MARIA DE LA LUZ BELLO ATANACIO

docket_entries.description: WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $3,259.61 AS TO DEFENDANT ATANACIO, MARIA DE LA LUZ BELLO

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) MARICRUZ CEDANO, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-09-2019 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC., REPRESENTED BY MARICRUZ CEDANO, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST S PRESENT. DEFENDANT MARIA DE LA LUZ BELLO ATANACIO IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ATANACIO, MARIA DE LA LUZ BELLO $2,347.15 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,447.15 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,347.15 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT ATANACIO, MARIA DE LA LUZ BELLO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-09-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$50.00) SERVED SEP-09-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ATANACIO, MARIA DE LA LUZ BELLO
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT ATANACIO, MARIA DE LA LUZ BELLO
